nogo.title: Finite-time exact recovery failure for smooth linear flows
nogo.summary: The flow remains invertible at every finite time, so it cannot annihilate a nontrivial disturbance space exactly.

boundaryNoGo.title: Bounded-domain projection transplant failure
boundaryNoGo.summary: The periodic exact projector still removes divergence, but it does not preserve the bounded-domain protected class because the projected field picks up nonzero boundary-normal trace.
